title: Big K Smokeless Coal Fire - 10kg
features: 5-6 hours burn time in standard open fire test
description: Big K's smokeless coal produces a high-heat output with a 5-6 hour burn time. The coal is fully authorised for use in smoke controlled areas, producing 80% less smoke than traditional coal. Smokeless coal is efficient, cost effective, and more environmentally friendly than traditional house coal, due to lower carbon emissions making it the perfect fuel choice whether you have an open fire, multi fuel stove, coal burning cooker or room heater.
